channel.title: Luanti Mods Feed
channel.description: Latest Luanti mods from Github, Gitlab, and Codeberg

item.title: edu_bricks (Github)
item.description:
Rainy428
Protected nodes for classroom use in Luanti (bricks, signs, torches)
License: MIT License
Download ZIP

item.title: reset_stage (Github)
item.description:
Rainy428
Simple area reset mod for Luanti. Save a region with markers and restore it instantly.
License: MIT License
Download ZIP

item.title: at (Github)
item.description:
bas080
jQuery like wrapper for position/vector
License: Unknown
Download ZIP

item.title: Natural Habitat (Gitlab)
item.description:
Mish7913
Mod for "Minetest Game" and "MineClonia".

Mod for Luanti games.
License: Unknown

zughy-friends-minetest
S4 League inspired shooter minigame for Luanti

item.title: vines (Github)
item.description:
bas080
Climbable vines, shears to harvest them and a rope box to help you climb.

item.title: little_lake (Github)
item.description:
bas080
Simple mod that spawns little lakes in caves near the surface and on mountains.

small util library for Luanti, providing country localised names and flags

item.title: simple_replace (Github)
item.description:
TheSilverStone
This mod for Luanti allows users to add blocks using the commands /fill /pos1 /pos2 /setnode.
License: Unknown
Download ZIP

item.title: minetest-flow (Github)

luk3yx
Yet another formspec library for ~~Minetest~~ Luanti

minetest-mods
A Luanti/Minetest mod - all about creating castles and castle dungeons.

lichenseed
AI chatbot integration for Luanti (Minetest) using Ollama models.

bgstack15
Luanti mod for using ldap as 2fa

item.title: homedecor_modpack (Github)

mt-mods
A fairly feature-filled home decor modpack that is game agnostic.
License: Other

item.title: events_api (Codeberg)
item.description:
TPH
API for creating, handling, and permitting function registration calls for custom events for Luanti/Minetest

item.title: farmtools (Codeberg)
item.description:
camelia
Based on the Scythes & Sickles mod by TestificateMods, this (WIP) mod adds various tools to make farming more convenient.
License: Unknown

item.title: areas_helper_tools (Gitlab)
item.description:
rangeTonic
Convenience tools for Areas protection mod
License: Unknown

item.title: Soothing 32 (Gitlab)
item.description:
zughy-friends-minetest
Lightweight yet aesthetically pleasing texture pack for Luanti. Seriously, it could run on a toaster!
License: Unknown
Download ZIP

item.title: leads (Codeberg)
item.description:
SilverSandstone
Adds leads to Luanti for moving and tethering animals.
License: Unknown

item.title: exile_songs (Codeberg)
item.description:
TPH
Plays songs in the background while you play Exile :3

Fork of https://github.com/minetest-mods/drawers.git
License: Unknown

item.title: alone (Codeberg)
item.description:
Codiac
A Luanti mod to disperse players around the world.
License: Unknown
Download ZIP

item.title: itemstore_api (Codeberg)
item.description:
perfect_city_game_studio
Itemstore API is a Luanti mod that exposes an API that allows placing items as entities in a node-dependent fashion.
License: Unknown
Download ZIP

item.title: ejection (Codeberg)
item.description:
yof
Luanti movement mod.
License: Unknown
Download ZIP

item.title: avantisavoia (Codeberg)
item.description:
JetpackJackson
A mod for Luanti that adds various WW1-related weapons, tools, and structures.
License: Unknown
Download ZIP

item.title: DrWho_Tardis (Codeberg)
item.description:
Skivling
A Doctor Who themed Luanti mod that adds various items and nodes, including a working TARDIS. Forked from https://github.com/PiDemon/Taridis_New , which is unmaintained.
License: Unknown
Download ZIP

item.title: advtrains_horntrack (Codeberg)
item.description:
SilverSandstone
Adds a track for automatically activating train horns in Luanti.
License: Unknown
Download ZIP

item.title: copper_pipes (Codeberg)
item.description:
Codiac
Replaces blocks and plastic tubes in Pipeworks with copper versions
License: Unknown
Download ZIP

item.title: flamegraph_register_node (Codeberg)
item.description:
Desour
Luanti mod that should help users that are hitting the upper limit on number of registered nodes.
License: Unknown
Download ZIP

item.title: epoxied_concrete (Codeberg)
item.description:
somedumbguy
Luanti Mod that uses epoxy from techage to create colored concrete blocks.
License: Unknown
Download ZIP

item.title: growdrygrass (Codeberg)
item.description:
SilverSandstone
Makes dry grass spread on savanna dirt in Luanti.
License: Unknown
Download ZIP

item.title: blockhead (Codeberg)
item.description:
SilverSandstone
Lets you put a block on your head in Luanti.
License: Unknown
Download ZIP

item.title: bed_rock (Codeberg)
item.description:

Luanti mod for a rock that you can use as bed
